# jmux Parity Audit — v0.62.0 → v0.64.10
<!-- Generated by Phase 0 audit. Update as batches land. -->
<!-- gitignore this file -->

## Quick Counts
DONE: ~15 | PARTIAL: 5 | MISSING: ~70 | SKIP-MAC-ONLY: ~20

---

## A0.2 — Parity Batches 1–5 Re-Audit

Batches 1–5 are **clean** with 2 HIGH-priority gaps not covered by any batch:

### HIGH — Not in any batch
1. **Workspace number shortcuts** (Ctrl+1…9 to switch workspace N)
   - File: `jmux/src/ui/window/shortcuts.rs` — add digit key handler
2. **Image drag-and-drop into SSH terminals** — deferred (base64 + scp/SFTP needed)

### MEDIUM — Partial coverage in batches
3. **First-click pane focus** — setting exists, GTK behavior unverified
4. **window.open() OAuth context** — partial; cross-context cookie sharing unclear

## Priority Backlog (for supervisor to schedule)

### P0 — Quick wins, high user impact (Haiku 4.5)
1. Workspace number shortcuts Ctrl+1..9 (`window/shortcuts.rs`)
2. `warnBeforeClosingTab` config key + UI
3. `copy-on-select` config key + UI
4. `app.confirmQuit` config key + UI
5. `tabBarFontSize` config key + UI
6. `workspaceCwdInheritance` config key
7. `plusButtonAction` config key + UI

### P1 — Self-contained medium features (Sonnet 4.6)
8. Agent integrations session restore (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini, Rovo Dev)
9. `jmux config` CLI subcommand (doctor/path/docs/reload)
10. `jmux browser cookies import` CLI
11. `jmux reorder-workspaces` batch + --dry-run
12. `--window` routing for window-scoped CLI
13. Browser Memory Saver (discard hidden webviews)
14. Deep-link popup handling (slack://, zoom://)
15. Keyboard shortcut unbinding + space as key
16. Live theme picker + dark:/light: conditionals
17. jmux://ssh deep links
18. `splitRatioPersist` config key

### P2 — Complex features (Opus 4.7 or scoping required)
19. Task Manager window + jmux top CLI
20. Passkey / WebAuthn / FIDO2
21. File explorer sidebar
22. iMessage mode
23. Agent conversation fork commands
24. Antigravity CLI integration
25. Remote websocket PTY hardening

### P3 — Deferred / Research needed
- Cloud VM management (Phase 10 in plan)
- Image drag-and-drop to SSH terminals
- JmuxExtensionKit sidebar prototypes
- IME fixes (Korean, Zhuyin, Japanese) — requires GTK IM expertise
